paymentMergeQR.pageSubtitle: Software recognition solution, 100% success rate, supports WeChat/Alipay/QQ and more
paymentMergeQR.showLogo: Show payment platform logos on redirect page
paymentMergeQR.techDesc1: Generates URL QR code pointing to redirect page
paymentMergeQR.techDesc2: Redirect page detects User-Agent to identify scanning app
paymentMergeQR.techDesc3: Automatically redirects to corresponding payment link
paymentMergeQR.testHint: ✅ This solution has 100% success rate! Please test with both WeChat and Alipay
paymentMergeQR.instruction1: Upload Alipay and WeChat Pay QR code images separately
paymentMergeQR.instruction2: Choose theme color and custom message (optional)
paymentMergeQR.instruction3: Click generate button to preview the merged result
paymentMergeQR.instruction4: Download PNG image and test with both WeChat and Alipay
paymentMergeQR.note1: Need to deploy pay-redirect.html file to server or CDN
paymentMergeQR.note2: Ensure redirect URL is publicly accessible
paymentMergeQR.note3: Test with both WeChat and Alipay before first use
paymentMergeQR.note4: Maintain QR code clarity when printing, avoid stains
paymentMergeQR.advantage2: Supports multiple platforms: WeChat, Alipay, QQ, etc.
paymentMergeQR.advantage3: Data secure, no payment information uploaded
paymentMergeQR.advantage4: Customizable redirect page theme and messages
paymentMergeQR.successMessage: Merge successful! Please download and test
paymentMergeQR.errorMessage: Please ensure you upload valid payment code images

paymentMergeQR.invalidQRCode: Unable to recognize QR code, please upload a clear payment code image

paymentMergeQR.wrongWechatQR: Please upload WeChat Pay code, current image is not a WeChat code

paymentMergeQR.fileReadError: File read failed, please try again
paymentMergeQR.disclaimer: Note: This tool is for demonstration purposes only. In actual use, please ensure your payment links comply with relevant regulations.

detector.title: Intelligent Unsafe Content Detection
detector.subtitle: Supports batch detection of images and videos. AI automatically analyzes content for inappropriate elements. All processing is done locally in your browser to protect your privacy. Now with multi-model support, custom thresholds, and report export.
detector.privacyDesc: All files are processed locally, never uploaded to any server
detector.batchDesc: Supports folder batch detection with automatic unsafe content organization
detector.multiModelDesc: Multiple AI models with customizable threshold settings
detector.techStack: Built with NSFW.js and TensorFlow.js. For reference only, not guaranteed to be 100% accurate

page.heroSubtitle: Local AI detection based on TensorFlow.js, privacy-first and efficient
page.featurePrivacyDesc: All processing is done locally in the browser, data is never uploaded to servers
page.featureBatchDesc: Supports detecting multiple files simultaneously with automatic result classification
page.featureMultiModelDesc: Supports multiple AI models with customizable detection thresholds

settings.title: Detection Settings

default.name: MobileNetV2 (Default)
default.description: Lightweight model, fast speed, suitable for most scenarios (Recommended)

inception_v3.name: InceptionV3 (High Accuracy)
inception_v3.description: Higher accuracy (93%), but larger model size and slower loading

strict.name: Strict Mode
strict.description: Lower thresholds, more sensitive detection of unsafe content, reduce false negatives

relaxed.name: Relaxed Mode
relaxed.description: Higher thresholds, reduce false positives, suitable for relaxed scenarios

settings.combinedThresholdDesc: Porn×0.7 + Hentai×0.3 exceeds this threshold will be marked as unsafe
settings.sampleFramesDesc: More frames increase accuracy but take longer
settings.hentaiOnlyDesc: Ignore other categories, focus only on Hentai content

info.categories: Detection results include 5 categories: Neutral, Drawing, Sexy, Hentai, Porn
info.usage1: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP images and MP4, WebM videos
info.usage2: All processing is done locally in your browser, files are never uploaded to servers
info.usage3: Videos are automatically sampled with multiple frames analyzed to find potential violations
info.usage5: AI deep learning models will be automatically enabled in production environment
info.batchUsage1: Supports batch detection of images and videos
info.batchUsage2: Can select folders for batch detection
info.batchUsage3: Supports multiple AI models and custom thresholds
info.batchUsage4: Can export JSON format detection reports
info.batchUsage5: All processing is done locally in your browser, files are never uploaded to servers

footer.disclaimer: This tool is strictly prohibited for illegal use. We assume no responsibility for any losses or damages caused by using this tool.

about.description: DC Tools provides AI-powered content safety detection tools, committed to providing secure, private, and efficient services.

about.title: About Us
about.content: DC Tools is an AI-powered content safety detection tool, committed to providing secure, private, and efficient content moderation services.
about.missionContent: DC Tools is dedicated to leveraging advanced AI technology to provide users with efficient and accurate content safety detection services. We believe that through technological innovation, we can make the internet environment safer and healthier.
about.advantage1: Local Processing: All detection is done locally in your browser, protecting user privacy
about.advantage2: AI-Powered: Based on deep learning models with high accuracy
about.advantage3: Fast & Efficient: Supports batch processing to save time
about.advantage4: Free to Use: All basic features are completely free

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: Users must comply with all applicable laws and regulations when using this tool. Illegal use is strictly prohibited.
terms.term1: This tool is for legal purposes only
terms.term2: Users must not use this tool for any illegal activities
terms.term3: Users are solely responsible for all consequences arising from using this tool
terms.disclaimer: The detection tools provided on this site are for reference only and do not guarantee 100% accuracy. Users should not rely entirely on detection results to make important decisions. We assume no responsibility for any direct or indirect losses caused by using this tool.
terms.ip: All content on this website (including but not limited to text, images, and code) is protected by copyright. No entity or individual may copy, reproduce, or use without written authorization.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: We are committed to protecting user privacy. All detection is performed locally, and we never upload or store any user data.
privacy.dataCollection: We do not collect, store, or transmit any user files or personal information. All detection is completed locally in your browser.
privacy.cookies: We only use essential cookies to ensure the website functions properly, such as language preferences and theme settings. These cookies are not used to track user behavior.
privacy.security: Since all processing is done locally, your data never leaves your device, ensuring the highest level of security.
privacy.thirdParty: We do not share user data with any third parties. The website may use CDN to load resources, but no user files are transmitted.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.content: We use essential cookies to ensure the website functions properly. We do not use cookies to track user behavior.
cookies.whatAreCookies: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to remember your preferences and settings.
cookies.cookieTypes: We only use essential functional cookies, including: language preferences, theme settings, and session management.
cookies.manageCookies: You can disable or delete cookies at any time through your browser settings. Please note that this may affect certain website functionality.
cookies.thirdPartyCookies: We do not use any third-party tracking cookies or advertising cookies.

onlineQR.pageSubtitle: Convert text, URLs, contacts and more into QR codes
onlineQR.levelHint: Higher correction level means more complex QR code but can still be read when partially covered
onlineQR.scanHint: Use your phone to scan and test the QR code
onlineQR.emptyHint: Enter content to generate QR code
onlineQR.tip1: All processing is done locally in your browser for privacy
onlineQR.tip2: Recommended error correction level: M or Q for balance
onlineQR.tip3: Maintain sufficient contrast and clarity when printing
onlineQR.tip4: Test with your phone after generation

wifiQR.pageSubtitle: Convert WiFi info to QR code, scan to connect instantly
wifiQR.ssidHint: This is the network name you see in your device's WiFi list
wifiQR.wpaDesc: Most secure and recommended encryption method
wifiQR.hiddenHint: If WiFi hides SSID, uncheck this for best compatibility
wifiQR.sizeHint: Larger size is better for printing, minimum 2.5cm x 2.5cm recommended
wifiQR.scanHint: Scan this QR code with phone camera or QR scanner to connect to WiFi
wifiQR.emptyHint: Fill in WiFi information to generate QR code
wifiQR.step2: Enter WiFi password (select 'No Password' if none)
wifiQR.step6: Print or share the QR code
wifiQR.practice1: Verify info: Double-check SSID and password before generating
wifiQR.practice2: Strong password: Use complex password for better security
wifiQR.practice3: Print quality: Maintain sufficient contrast, minimum 2.5cm
wifiQR.practice4: Test scan: Test with your own device first
wifiQR.practice5: Avoid hidden SSID: May reduce compatibility
wifiQR.privacyDesc: All WiFi information is processed locally in your browser, never uploaded to servers.

qrDecode.pageSubtitle: Support image upload, paste and camera scanning
qrDecode.emptyHint: Upload image or start camera to decode QR code
qrDecode.privacyNote: All processing is done locally in your browser for privacy
qrDecode.notFound: QR code not detected, please ensure image is clear
qrDecode.cameraError: Cannot access camera, please check permissions

barcode.pageSubtitle: Support multiple standard formats for product management, inventory tracking, etc.
barcode.scanHint: Test with barcode scanner or mobile app
barcode.code128Desc: Supports all ASCII characters, high density
barcode.code39Desc: Supports letters, numbers and special characters
barcode.itfDesc: Interleaved 2 of 5, even number of digits
barcode.code128Info: Most versatile format, supports all ASCII characters, high density, widely used
barcode.eanInfo: Global retail standard for product checkout. EAN-13 has 13 digits, UPC-A has 12 digits
barcode.code39Info: Early industrial standard, supports uppercase letters and numbers, good compatibility
barcode.itfInfo: Designed for numbers only, high density, commonly used on outer packaging, requires even digits
barcode.codabarInfo: Used in healthcare, libraries, supports numbers and special characters
barcode.tip1: Different formats have specific content requirements, ensure correct input
barcode.tip2: Maintain sufficient contrast when printing (black on white or white on black)
barcode.tip4: Test scan to ensure readability before batch use
barcode.generateError: Generation failed, please check content format
